session:
version: 0.3.10
name: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
predecessor: null
images:
- name: mysql_client_setup_image
  injection_files:
  - path: /etc/setup.sql
    content: |
      -- GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'root'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$';
      GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'root'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$';
      FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
      SELECT 'root grants configured' mysql_client_setup_image;
      -- Create replication user
      CREATE USER 'replica'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$$SCONE::REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD:hex$$';
      GRANT REPLICATION SLAVE ON *.* TO 'replica'@'%';
      FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
      SELECT 'replica user configured' mysql_client_setup_image;
      -- # Fix 1062 error
      RESET MASTER;
      SELECT 'master reset executed' mysql_client_setup_image;
- name: db_image
  injection_files:
  - path: /etc/my.cnf
    content: |
      # This group is read both both by the client and the server
      # use it for options that affect everything
      [client-server]
      # This group is read by the server
      [mysqld]
      user=mysql
      datadir=/var/lib/mysql
      skip-host-cache
      skip-name-resolve
      # Disabling symbolic-links is recommended to prevent assorted security risks
      symbolic-links=0
      # Network
      bind-address = 0.0.0.0
      port = 3306

      # Replication conf
      server_id = 1
      max_allowed_packet=256M
      log_bin = /var/lib/mysql/mysql-bin.log
      expire_logs_days=30
      # binlog_expire_logs_seconds and expire_logs_days are forms of aliases, such that changes to one automatically reflect in the other.

      # For MaxScale
      gtid_strict_mode=1
      gtid_domain_id=1
      auto_increment_increment=2
      auto_increment_offset=1
      log_slave_updates=1
      slave-skip-errors=1396,1950
      expire_logs_days=7


      ## NATIVE-ENCRYPTION: Uncomment the encryption params to get basic native encryption
      # Encryption parameters
      plugin_load_add = file_key_management
      file_key_management_filename = /etc/keys.txt
      file_key_management_encryption_algorithm = aes_cbc
      encrypt_binlog = 1
      innodb_file_per_table=ON
      innodb_encrypt_tables = ON
      innodb_encrypt_log = ON
      innodb_encryption_threads = 4
      innodb_encryption_rotate_key_age = 0 # Do not rotate key
      innodb-tablespaces-encryption = ON
      encrypt_tmp_files = ON
      innodb_log_group_home_dir = /var/lib/mysql
      innodb_data_home_dir = /var/lib/mysql
  - path: /etc/keys.txt
    content: 1;$$SCONE::mysql_encryption_key32.hex$$
secrets:
- name: mysql_encryption_key32
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  kind: binary
  size: 32
- name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
- name: METRICS_EXPORTER_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: METRICS_EXPORTER_PASSWORD
- name: REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD
- name: MARIADB_CA_KEY
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MARIADB_CA_KEY
- name: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MARIADB_CA_CERT
- name: mariadb
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: mariadb
- name: setupClientCert
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: setupClientCert
  kind: x509
services:
- name: probe
  image_name: mysql_client_setup_image
  mrenclaves:
  - 0b336c1d42aa80cc37a8bcfda5e215ec041b458ac7f736703fa85ba28288437f
  environment:
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_DESTINATION: unix:/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_FLAGS: TolerateInsecureUnixCredentials
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_SERVER_DNS_NAME: osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-primary-service
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: refuse
  command:
  - mysqladmin
  - status
  - -uroot
  - -p$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
- name: db
  image_name: db_image
  mrenclaves:
  - 0c4d6f21d6adb63f1ccd182c31cf9af90f4e5a18e9726e9b473c18e3142caaa9
  environment:
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: $$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_DESTINATION: TCP:osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-replica-service:3307
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_DESTINATION_IP: '*'
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::mariadb:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::mariadb:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_SOCK: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_SOCK_CLIENT_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_SOCK_FLAGS: TolerateInsecureUnixCredentials
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_SOCK_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::mariadb:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::mariadb:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_SOCK_PORT: unix:/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_TCP: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_TCP_CLIENT_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_TCP_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::mariadb:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::mariadb:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_TCP_PORT: TCP:3306
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: unprotected
    SCONE_SYNC_FSPF_TAG_WITH_CAS: '0'
  command: mysqld --innodb-use-native-aio=0 --innodb-flush-method=fsync
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
- name: bootstrap
  image_name: db_image
  mrenclaves:
  - 0c4d6f21d6adb63f1ccd182c31cf9af90f4e5a18e9726e9b473c18e3142caaa9
  environment:
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: $$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_SYNC_FSPF_TAG_WITH_CAS: '0'
  command: mysqld --bootstrap --basedir=/usr --datadir=/var/lib/mysql --log-warnings=0  --plugin-dir=/usr/lib/mariadb/plugin  --innodb-use-native-aio=0 --user=mysql --max_allowed_packet=8M --net_buffer_length=16K --default-storage-engine=innodb
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
- name: db_before_setup
  image_name: db_image
  mrenclaves:
  - 0c4d6f21d6adb63f1ccd182c31cf9af90f4e5a18e9726e9b473c18e3142caaa9
  environment:
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_1: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_1_CLIENT_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_1_FLAGS: TolerateInsecureUnixCredentials
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_1_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::mariadb:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::mariadb:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_1_PORT: unix:/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: refuse
    SCONE_SYNC_FSPF_TAG_WITH_CAS: '0'
  command: mysqld --innodb-use-native-aio=0 --innodb-flush-method=fsync --skip-networking
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
- name: create_user
  image_name: mysql_client_setup_image
  mrenclaves:
  - 0ece90c34d39332425c3c4ff7a94d590fe43a1627020df6e64d528907800f6f8
  environment:
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_DESTINATION: unix:/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_FLAGS: TolerateInsecureUnixCredentials
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_1_SERVER_DNS_NAME: mysqld
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: refuse
  command:
  - mysql
  - -e
  - source /etc/setup.sql;
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
access_policy:
  read:
  - ANY
  update:
  - CREATOR
security:
  attestation:
    mode: hardware
    tolerate:
    - debug-mode
    - hyperthreading
    - outdated-tcb
    - insecure-configuration
    - software-hardening-needed
    ignore_advisories: '*'
creator:
  signer: |
    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
    MCowBQYDK2VwAyEAcKtAFLOMRitgqlXJgLRvctwmDlY+xowL6ed9nQDHbc8=
    -----END PUBLIC KEY-----
